narrative: Dollar retreats as Israel-Gaza ceasefire news cools geopolitical risk—DXY -0.16%; gold higher +0.81% near $4,503; equities +0.40%; VIX 15.4. USD/JPY holds at 159.99 as BoJ tightening signals offset the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry; 25d RR at -1.15 shows moderate put skew as options markets hedge for JPY strength. NZD/USD bilateral divergence remains the week's dominant G8 theme (spread 1.355%). Watch US Non-Farm Payrolls tomorrow.
